title: The Gifted
description: Unlock abilities by surviving danger, injecting powerful serums, or experimenting with alien tech and mutation.
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b7123273bd8ff9daa675622a34b12cdc08b354b.png)

Gifted is a chaotic, lore-rich Minecraft mod where players can gain unpredictable powers through stress, science, or fate. Unlock abilities by surviving danger, injecting powerful serums, or experimenting with alien tech and mutation. Face off against mutated mobs, rogue labs, and containment forces trying to control the outbreak. Choose your path: gifted, enhanced, or human. No two runs are the same — power comes at a cost.

current serums 

Adrenaline Boost Serum – Temporarily increases speed, reaction time, and combat reflexes.



Titan Strength Serum – Grants super strength for a short time but causes fatigue afterward.



Neural Enhancement Serum – Improves intelligence, allowing the player to understand alien languages.



Regeneration Serum – Speeds up healing, but can mutate the player unpredictably.




this mod is also required 
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes)
